expo.name: NoStress
expo.description: NoStress — Discover the best events, bars, restaurants, clubs and lounges across Africa. Concerts, festivals, parties and more — find what's happening near you and save your favourites.

infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: $(PRODUCT_NAME) uses your location to show you nearby events and venues.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: $(PRODUCT_NAME) needs camera access to take photos for your events or profile.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: $(PRODUCT_NAME) needs access to your photo library to choose a profile picture or partner logo.
infoPlist.NSUserNotificationUsageDescription: $(PRODUCT_NAME) sends notifications about new nearby events, your favorites, and booking updates.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: $(PRODUCT_NAME) uses the microphone so you can speak to the AI assistant.
infoPlist.NSSpeechRecognitionUsageDescription: $(PRODUCT_NAME) uses speech recognition to transcribe your questions to the AI assistant.

plugins.photosPermission: $(PRODUCT_NAME) needs access to your photo library to choose a profile picture or partner logo.
plugins.cameraPermission: $(PRODUCT_NAME) needs camera access to take photos for your events or profile.

plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: $(PRODUCT_NAME) uses your location to show you nearby events and venues.

plugins.microphonePermission: $(PRODUCT_NAME) uses the microphone so you can speak to the AI assistant.
plugins.speechRecognitionPermission: $(PRODUCT_NAME) uses speech recognition to transcribe your questions to the AI assistant.
